title: Override "read(byte[],int,int)" for efficient stream reading
description: Directly subclassing java.io.InputStream or java.io.FilterInputStream and not providing an efficient implementation of read(byte[],int,int) can create a lot of overhead and is inefficient. This rule raises an issue when a direct subclass of java.io.InputStream or java.io.FilterInputStream doesn't provide an override of read(byte[],int,int).
recommendation: Provide an efficient implementation of read(byte[],int,int) in subclasses of java.io.InputStream or java.io.FilterInputStream.
impact: Improves code performance and reduces overhead.

checks.message: Provide an efficient implementation of read(byte[],int,int) in subclasses of java.io.InputStream or java.io.FilterInputStream.
